name: repetitive_text_reveal
description: Same staggered text animation used on every section
rule: Do not use text-reveal more than 2 times per page

name: animation_spam
rule: Limit animations to key elements only

name: no_motion_hierarchy
problem: No clear focus or visual guidance
rule: Define one primary animation per section

name: simultaneous_start
description: All animations start at the same time
rule: Always use stagger or delay variation

name: default_easing
rule: Use power2.out or power3.out as default

name: overused_purple_gradient
problem: Looks like generic AI startup template

name: centered_everything
description: All content centered with no layout variation
rule: Alternate between centered and asymmetrical layouts

name: too_many_font_styles
description: Multiple fonts and weights without system
rule: Limit to 1-2 font families and defined scale

name: hover_everything
rule: Apply hover only to interactive elements

name: no_visual_rest
rule: Include calm sections with minimal motion

name: copy_paste_sections
description: Sections look identical with minor text changes
rule: Each section must have distinct layout or behavior

name: inconsistent_animation_style
description: Mixing playful, bouncy and minimal animations
rule: Stick to one motion style per page

name: too_many_simultaneous_effects
description: Scale + rotate + blur + opacity all at once
